run_command: $env:PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE='1'; $env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m negflow process "data\fff\图像 003.fff" --output output --preset neutral_archive; $env:PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE='1'; $env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m negflow process "data\fff\图像 002.fff" --output output --preset neutral_archive
main_issues: 图像 003.fff old projection detector still reports 17 boxes, but active selection now uses 12 plausible OpenCV boxes.
图像 003.fff final PNG export now contains 12 files.
图像 002.fff remains stable at 12 active boxes and 12 final PNG files.
The crop error is reduced by component ROI plus regular separator selection, but visual review is still required for unusual scans.
next_step: Run the active crop/export path on 图像 001.fff, then decide whether to tune crop fallback rules further or move back to color improvement.
